body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35351", "cvss": {"score": 4.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-281", "name": "Improper Preservation of Permissions"}], "description": "The mv utility in uutils coreutils fails to preserve file ownership during moves across different filesystem boundaries. The utility falls back to a copy-and-delete routine that creates the destination file using the caller's UID/GID rather than the source's metadata. This flaw breaks backups and migrations, causing files moved by a privileged user (e.g., root) to become root-owned unexpectedly, which can lead to information disclosure or restricted access for the intended owners.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00132, "percentile": 0.03058}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-957r-r8gc-vv3h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-29T23:18:01Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-957r-r8gc-vv3h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-957r-r8gc-vv3h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35351"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35351", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/issues/9714", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-957r-r8gc-vv3h"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "uutils coreutils doesn't preserve file ownership during moves across different filesystem boundaries", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-29T23:18:01Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-957r-r8gc-vv3h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.8.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
